calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing to Quiet Title-Real Property this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez
Appearances:
Cary L. Dictor, Esq. for Plaintiff, Biling Hsieh Cheng, and witness Robert Price also present, were sworn & examined. Plaintiff Hang Tang Cheng was not present.
After hearing the evidence presented as offer of proof, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant. The Plaintiffs are deemed owners of the property located at 310 Sutter Street, San Francisco. Fee simple absolute. Judgment for reformation of deed and quiet title; see description of real property in judgment, exhibit A.
Judgment signed in open court.
